name: re-run against unchanged URL keeps each rule's introduced_in frozen (§28.40 Consumer Compatibility Contract grandfathering)
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r09-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Encrypt at rest

All data must be encrypted.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml </dev/null; INTRO1=$(grep introduced_in $OUT/out/us-government/r09-src.yaml | head -1); bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/reg.yaml --force --now 2026-12-31T00:00:00Z --out-dir $OUT/out 2>/dev/null; INTRO2=$(grep introduced_in $OUT/out/us-government/r09-src.yaml | head -1); [ "$INTRO1" = "$INTRO2" ] && echo content-hash-preserves-introduced-in 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
